message:
fix: address XSS vulnerabilities and code smells in graph export

- Escape HTML title with html.EscapeString() to prevent XSS via
  malicious issue titles in <title> tag
- Replace tooltip innerHTML concatenation with safe D3 .text() DOM
  construction to prevent XSS via issue titles/assignees
- Implement dotEscapeID to actually escape backslash and double-quote
  characters instead of being a no-op
- Handle json.Marshal errors instead of silently discarding them

Co-authored-by: paf0186 <paf0186@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
